positive: A whimsical and stylized mountain landscape at sunset, featuring sharp, abstract geometric peaks and rolling foothills. The foreground contains a stylized grove of bioluminescent flora with distinct, repeating patterns, anchored by a central, massive, stylized tree with sweeping roots. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by deep indigo, electric cyan, burnt orange, and gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for screen printing, utilizing strong silhouettes and clean negative space. Style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and modern minimalist folk illustration. High contrast, crisp lines, and a smooth, matte texture.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blur, noise, low resolution, artifacts, poor anatomy, multiple limbs, extra fingers, ugly, dirty, sketch, realistic photo, hyperdetailed, graffiti
